news.paragraph: Workday's stock has recently dipped despite broader market gains. Additionally, competitor SAP is increasing its push to integrate AI agents into finance workflows, which may affect the competitive landscape. There are no imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory announcements mentioned in the recent headlines.
headlines: Workday (WDAY) Stock Dips While Market Gains: Key Facts
ASTS Reports Wider-Than-Expected Q1 Loss Despite Revenue Expansion

SAP ramps up push to bring AI agents to finance teams
